steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The crucial phrase is “continues to use Apollo's data”. This present-tense action shows that Metzger actively uses the Apollo data today—meaning the missions' value remains relevant and has not diminished.

steps.title: Match the persistent meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is that the missions' value persists and remains active today. Ongoing expresses exactly this.

The other choices don't work: “original” means initial only, “displaced” implies removal, and “controversial” is unsupported.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
